title: centaurea leucadea
intro: Centaurea leucadea, also known as Cretan centaury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the eastern Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations to treat conditions such as indigestion, bloating, and liver disorders, and its health benefits include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Centaurea leucadea can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
